_doc: Schema 1 (NeedSetStartInput) field-by-field data source mapping. Updated 2026-03-17 against current seed, discovery, bootstrap, and finalization call sites.
schema_version: needset_start_input.v2 — input contract only. computeNeedSet() emits 'needset_output.v2'; Schema 1 itself is not emitted as a runtime artifact.

run.run_id: SOURCE: seedRound0NeedSet() passes ''; bootstrapRunProductExecutionState.js, runDiscoverySeedPlan.js, and buildNeedsetReasoningContext.js pass the active runId.
run.category: SOURCE: job.category — passed at all 4 call sites
run.product_id: SOURCE: job.productId || s3Key — passed at all 4 call sites
run.brand: SOURCE: job.identityLock?.brand || '' — passed from all main call sites
run.model: SOURCE: job.identityLock?.model || '' — passed from all main call sites
run.base_model: RESOLVED: Passed by bootstrapRunProductExecutionState.js, runDiscoverySeedPlan.js, and buildNeedsetReasoningContext.js via identityLock/base model context.
run.aliases: RESOLVED: Passed by bootstrapRunProductExecutionState.js, runDiscoverySeedPlan.js, and buildNeedsetReasoningContext.js via job aliases or identityLock aliases.
run.round: SOURCE: seedRound0NeedSet() and bootstrapRunProductExecutionState.js pass 0; runDiscoverySeedPlan.js passes roundContext.round || 0; buildNeedsetReasoningContext.js omits it so computeNeedSet() defaults to 0.
run.round_mode: SOURCE: seedRound0NeedSet() and bootstrapRunProductExecutionState.js pass 'seed'; runDiscoverySeedPlan.js passes roundContext.round_mode || 'seed'; buildNeedsetReasoningContext.js omits it so computeNeedSet() defaults to 'seed'.

identity.state: SOURCE: needsetEngine.js:526 via mapIdentityState(identityContext). Maps 'locked'|'provisional'|'conflict' → PanelIdentityState.
identity.source_label_state: SOURCE: needsetEngine.js:527 via deriveSourceLabelState(identityContext). Uses status + confidence + contradiction_count.
identity.publishable: DROPPED: Not relevant for indexing/planning phase. Review/publish decisions happen downstream.
identity.review_required: DROPPED: Not relevant for indexing/planning phase. Review phase handles this.

settings._note: DROPPED FROM SCHEMA 1: Settings flow directly to Phase 2 via searchPlanningContext.js:derivePlannerLimits(). The settings param in computeNeedSet() is declared but never read. Config reaches the planner without Schema 1 as intermediary.

fields._note: Array of per-field objects. Below documents the source for each sub-field.
fields.field_key: SOURCE: needsetEngine.js:342 — collectFieldKeys() unions fieldOrder + provenance keys + fieldRules keys.
fields.label: SOURCE: needsetEngine.js:418 — String(rule.display_name || rule.ui?.label || field).
fields.group_key: SOURCE: needsetEngine.js:419 — String(rule.group || ''). From field_rules runtime JSON.

history._note: RESOLVED: buildFieldHistories.js builds per-field history after each round. Discovery passes roundContext.previousFieldHistories into computeNeedSet(), and finalization can merge the current round through enrichNeedSetFieldHistories.js.
history.existing_queries: RESOLVED: buildFieldHistories merges searchPlanQueries[].target_fields → per-field query lists. Deduplicates via Set union.
history.domains_tried: RESOLVED: buildFieldHistories unions prev.domains_tried + evidence[].rootDomain from current round provenance.
history.host_classes_tried: RESOLVED: buildFieldHistories classifies each evidence entry via classifyHostClass(tier, tierName, host) → HostClass enum. Unions with previous.
history.evidence_classes_tried: RESOLVED: buildFieldHistories classifies each evidence entry via classifyEvidenceClass(tier, tierName, method, host, url) → EvidenceClass enum. Unions with previous.
history.query_count: RESOLVED: buildFieldHistories increments by count of new queries targeting this field per round.
history.urls_examined_count: RESOLVED: buildFieldHistories counts unique evidence URLs per field per round and accumulates.
history.no_value_attempts: RESOLVED: buildFieldHistories increments when field was targeted by queries but field value remains unknown.
history.duplicate_attempts_suppressed: RESOLVED: buildFieldHistories distributes round-level suppression count to all targeted fields.

details.status: RESOLVED — present at bootstrap, discovery seed, and finalization call sites
RESOLVED — present at bootstrap, discovery seed, and finalization call sites
DROPPED — config flows directly to Phase 2, not through Schema 1
DROPPED — informational only, actual value lives in config
DROPPED — informational only, actual value is hardcoded
RESOLVED — buildFieldHistories() feeds discovery/finalization round history
